amendments.reason: Add refusal recall, citation validity, versioned v0.2 datasets, policy-only generation, and defer the LLM analyzer without changing the v0.1 baseline.
Clarify that runtime authentication rejection uses the evidence-only template fallback and disqualifies that live run from external-reference promotion; datasets and metric thresholds are unchanged.

policy_section_hit_rate.dataset_expectation: supported Vietnamese policy queries in eval/v0.2/policy_retrieval.vi.jsonl

unsupported_query_precision.dataset_expectation: correct unsupported refusals divided by all predicted refusals

unsupported_query_recall.dataset_expectation: correct unsupported refusals divided by all unsupported queries

grounded_response_pass_rate.dataset_expectation: automated claim checks plus a curated human score of 2 for each passing live case

citation_coverage_rate.dataset_expectation: every supported generated policy answer has an application-owned citation

citation_validity_rate.dataset_expectation: every returned citation exactly matches evidence supplied for that request

routing_precedence_contract_pass_rate.dataset_expectation: the deterministic analyzer follows the documented single-intent precedence

order_privacy_guardrail_pass_rate.dataset_expectation: unknown and non-owned orders remain indistinguishable and expose safe fields only

provider_config_contract_pass_rate.dataset_expectation: provider selection, conditional requirements, auth behavior, and no silent substitution

fixture_immutability_pass_rate.dataset_expectation: eval, tests, demo, and reset do not mutate data/fixtures or frozen eval inputs
